boundary404: The requested page could not be found.
genericPourError: Something went wrong processing your pour.
invalidImageType: Please choose an image file (for example JPG or PNG).
imageTooLarge: That image is too large (max {maxMb} MB). Try a smaller photo.
readImageFailed: We couldn't read that image. Try another photo or export it again.
readImageFailedShort: Couldn't read that image. Try a different file.
barNameRequired: Enter a bar name (search or type your own).
ratingRange: Pour rating must be between 0 and 5.
pintPriceNonNegative: Pint price must be zero or a positive number.
pourRateLimited: Too many pours this hour. Try again later.
duplicatePourImage: This exact photo was already submitted.
imageTimestampStale: Photo date in the file looks too old. Take a new picture at the bar.
pourAnalysisTimedOut: Analysis timed out (ANALYSIS_TIMEOUT). Try a smaller photo or try again in a moment.
pourScoringServiceUnavailable: Could not reach the scoring service (ROBOFLOW_FAILED). Try again shortly.
